feat.name: Opportune Opening
feat.text: Your combat training taught you to capitalize on any moment of weakness from your foe. You make a melee Strike against the same creature your ally just hit. The creature is off-guard against this Strike.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.trigger: An ally lands a critical hit on a creature within your melee reach.
